gaps_known: Counters/matchups: razonamiento de meta, no data minada
Goal zone multipliers: TiMi no publica numeros

Attacker.description_en: Ranged or burst damage dealers, fragile, high damage
Attacker.description_es: Danio a distancia o burst, fragiles, alto danio

held_items.effect_en: Basic attacks deal bonus damage = 1% of target's remaining HP
held_items.effect_es: Ataques basicos hacen danio bonus = 1% del HP restante del objetivo
held_items.synergy_en: Physical attackers with sustained basic attacks (Cinderace, Greninja)
held_items.synergy_es: Atacantes fisicos con ataques basicos sostenidos (Cinderace, Greninja)

held_items.effect_en: Boosts basic-attack crit damage, scales with Attack
held_items.effect_es: Aumenta danio critico de ataques basicos, escala con Ataque
held_items.synergy_es: Velocistas dependientes de critico (Absol, Zeraora, Talonflame)

held_items.effect_en: On hit with a move, recovers >=45 HP (scales with Sp. Atk)
held_items.effect_es: Al golpear con un movimiento, recupera >=45 HP (escala con Atq. Esp.)
held_items.synergy_en: Sustain fighters with Sp. Atk scaling moves (Lucario, Machamp)
held_items.synergy_es: Luchadores con sustain y movimientos que escalan con Atq. Esp. (Lucario, Machamp)

held_items.effect_en: +3% Sp. Atk bonus
held_items.effect_es: +3% bonus de Atq. Esp.
held_items.synergy_en: Pure special attackers (Pikachu, Mr. Mime, Venusaur)
held_items.synergy_es: Atacantes especiales puros (Pikachu, Mr. Mime, Venusaur)

held_items.effect_en: When low HP, recover 8% of lost HP/sec for 3s
held_items.effect_es: Con HP bajo, recupera 8% del HP perdido/seg por 3s
held_items.synergy_en: Frontline tanks and bruisers (Snorlax, Trevenant, Mamoswine)
held_items.synergy_es: Tanques y luchadores de frente (Snorlax, Trevenant, Mamoswine)

held_items.effect_en: After Unite Move, +7% damage for 4s
held_items.effect_es: Tras movimiento Unite, +7% de danio por 4s
held_items.synergy_en: Pokemon with strong Unite Move (Pikachu, Cramorant, Lucario)
held_items.synergy_es: Pokemon con movimiento Unite fuerte (Pikachu, Cramorant, Lucario)

held_items.effect_en: +10% move speed out of combat
held_items.effect_es: +10% de velocidad de movimiento fuera de combate

held_items.effect_en: On Unite Move, user + lowest-HP ally each get a shield = 20% max HP
held_items.effect_es: En movimiento Unite, tu y el aliado con menos HP reciben escudo = 20% HP max.
held_items.synergy_es: Iniciadores de team fight (Blissey, Eldegoss, Snorlax, Mamoswine)

held_items.effect_en: While scoring, shield = 5% max HP; goal can't be interrupted while shielded
held_items.effect_es: Al anotar, escudo = 5% HP max.; el gol no se interrumpe mientras dura

held_items.effect_en: On scoring, +100 max HP (stacks)
held_items.effect_es: Al anotar, +100 HP max. (acumula)
held_items.synergy_es: Tanques que escalan con HP (Snorlax, Blastoise, Slowbro)

held_items.effect_en: On scoring, +6 Attack (stacks)
held_items.effect_es: Al anotar, +6 Ataque (acumula)
held_items.synergy_es: Carries que anotan rapido (Lucario, Charizard, Cinderace)

held_items.effect_en: On scoring, +8 Sp. Atk (stacks)
held_items.effect_es: Al anotar, +8 Atq. Esp. (acumula)
held_items.synergy_en: Sp. Atk burst scalers (Cramorant, Mr. Mime, Pikachu)
held_items.synergy_es: Escaladores de Atq. Esp. burst (Cramorant, Mr. Mime, Pikachu)

held_items.effect_en: Out of combat, recover 1% max HP/sec
held_items.effect_es: Fuera de combate, recupera 1% HP max./seg

held_items.effect_en: Lowest-EXP ally gains 2 EXP/s; nearby allies get bonus EXP on wild KO
held_items.effect_es: El aliado con menos EXP gana 2 EXP/s; aliados cercanos reciben EXP bonus al derrotar salvajes
held_items.synergy_en: Supporters that lane with carry (Blissey, Eldegoss, Mr. Mime)
held_items.synergy_es: Soportes que lanean con el carry (Blissey, Eldegoss, Mr. Mime)

held_items.effect_en: Out of combat, shield nullifying Sp. Atk damage = 9% max HP
held_items.effect_es: Fuera de combate, escudo que anula danio de Atq. Esp. = 9% HP max.

held_items.effect_en: Returns 3% of attacker's max HP as damage on hit
held_items.effect_es: Devuelve 3% del HP max. del atacante como danio al recibir golpe
held_items.synergy_es: Luchadores cuerpo a cuerpo (Machamp, Buzzwole, Tyranitar)

held_items.effect_en: After using a move, next basic attack +10 dmg (scales with Atk); melee holders also slow
held_items.effect_es: Tras usar movimiento, proximo ataque basico +10 danio (escala con Atq.); melee ademas ralentiza

held_items.effect_en: Move hits gain +40 damage (scales with Sp. Atk)
held_items.effect_es: Los golpes de movimiento ganan +40 danio (escala con Atq. Esp.)
held_items.synergy_en: Sp. Atk burst combos (Pikachu, Venusaur, Cramorant)
held_items.synergy_es: Combos burst de Atq. Esp. (Pikachu, Venusaur, Cramorant)

held_items.effect_en: On taking damage, +2% Atk (stacks up)
held_items.effect_es: Al recibir danio, +2% Ataque (acumula)
held_items.synergy_en: Brawlers that take damage (Lucario, Mimikyu, Buzzwole)
held_items.synergy_es: Luchadores que reciben danio (Lucario, Mimikyu, Buzzwole)

held_items.effect_en: Sp. Atk attacks ignore a % of target's Sp. Def
held_items.effect_es: Los ataques de Atq. Esp. ignoran un % de la Def. Esp. del objetivo

held_items.effect_en: After 3 chained basic attacks, +30/35/40% movement speed
held_items.effect_es: Tras 3 ataques basicos encadenados, +30/35/40% velocidad de movimiento
held_items.synergy_en: Auto-attackers that need sticking power (Cinderace, Lucario)

held_items.effect_en: After 3 basic attacks, +basic attack speed briefly
held_items.effect_es: Tras 3 ataques basicos, +vel. de ataque basico brevemente

held_items.effect_en: Lifesteal on Attack-based basic attacks
held_items.effect_es: Robo de vida en ataques basicos de Ataque

held_items.effect_en: Periodic AoE shield on hit
held_items.effect_es: Escudo AoE periodico al recibir golpe

held_items.effect_en: +100% Aeos from wilds, +10% goal score speed
held_items.effect_es: +100% Aeos de salvajes, +10% velocidad de anotacion
held_items.synergy_en: Jungle farmers that score often (Mr. Mime, Sableye)
held_items.synergy_es: Farmeros de jungla que anotan seguido (Mr. Mime, Sableye)

held_items.effect_en: Recovery and shield effects to allies are boosted
held_items.effect_es: Efectos de recuperacion y escudo a aliados potenciados

held_items.effect_en: Build energy via movement/basics; bonus damage at full
held_items.effect_es: Acumula energia con movimiento/basicos; danio bonus al maximo

held_items.effect_en: On KO, +Atk (1/2 on assist)
held_items.effect_es: Al eliminar, +Ataque (mitad en asistencia)

held_items.effect_en: On KO, +Sp. Atk (1/2 on assist)
held_items.effect_es: Al eliminar, +Atq. Esp. (mitad en asistencia)

held_items.effect_en: Boosts HP recovery effects
held_items.effect_es: Potencia efectos de recuperacion de HP

held_items.effect_en: On hindrance, Def/Sp. Def up
held_items.effect_es: Al recibir hindrance, Def/Def. Esp. suben

held_items.effect_en: Weaken enemy HP recovery with basic attacks
held_items.effect_es: Debilita recuperacion de HP enemiga con ataques basicos

held_items.effect_en: Weaken enemy HP recovery with Sp. Atk moves
held_items.effect_es: Debilita recuperacion de HP enemiga con movimientos de Atq. Esp.
held_items.synergy_en: Sp. Atk users vs. sustain (Pikachu, Cramorant)
held_items.synergy_es: Usuarios de Atq. Esp. vs. sustain (Pikachu, Cramorant)

battle_items.effect_es: Sube Ataque y Atq. Esp. por 6.5s

battle_items.effect_en: Stuns wild Pokemon in front, marks for bonus damage
battle_items.effect_es: Aturde Pokemon salvajes al frente, marca para danio bonus
Dash rapido en la direccion elegida
Limpia estados, breve inmunidad a hindrance

battle_items.effect_en: Invulnerable + status immune but can't act
battle_items.effect_es: Invulnerable + inmune a estados pero no podes actuar

battle_items.effect_en: Buffs ally goal zone / nullifies enemy
